title: narcissus breviflos
intro: Narcissus breviflos, also known as the small-flowered daffodil or small-cupped narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat respiratory issues and as a natural antispasmodic. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Narcissus breviflos is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting effects.
